name: GTO Duel
notes: The 'manifest.json' at the project root is the Web App Manifest (W3C); this _build-manifest.json is the AutoBuilder integrator manifest. They are deliberately separated because the Web App Manifest path is load-bearing for PWA install on iOS Safari and must remain at ./manifest.json.

deliverable_layout.manifest.json: Web App Manifest (display: standalone) per IP2.A4
deliverable_layout.sw.js: Service worker; registered at relative './sw.js' so scope == GitHub Pages subpath
deliverable_layout.firestore.rules: user pastes this into Firebase Console > Firestore > Rules
deliverable_layout.README.md: user setup instructions (load-bearing per F.3, S6.A4)
deliverable_layout.src/state.js: Firebase adapter (the only file that imports firebase-app)
deliverable_layout.src/stats.js: wrap-up math (per-player accuracy, agreement, ranked disagreements)
deliverable_layout.src/config.js: USER MUST EDIT — Firebase + VAPID config
